message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[0, 1, 1.0], [1, 2, -4.0], [2, 1, 1.0], [2, 3, 0.5], [3, 4, 0.2]]","[100.0, 101.0, 102.0, 103.0, 104.0]","[[2, 200.0], [1, 150.0]]","[[0, 4], [0, 3], [3, 0]]"],"focus":"negative_cycle_reachable_no_direct (should yield +inf for reachable queries when no direct edge exists)"},{"input_lines":["[[0, 1, 1.0], [1, 2, 1.0], [0, 2, 5.0], [2, 3, 0.0]]","[10.0, 11.0, 12.0, 9.5]","[[0, 9.0], [2, 13.0]]","[[0, 2], [0, 3], [1, 3]]"],"focus":"direct_edge_preference_vs_cheaper_path (direct edge present but alternative path has lower summed fee)"},{"input_lines":["[[1, 1, -10.0], [1, 2, 2.0], [0, 1, 0.1]]","[50.0, 60.0, 70.0]","[[1, 59.5], [1, 1000.0], [2, 69.5], [0, 49.9]]","[[1, 2], [0, 2], [2, 0]]"],"focus":"self_loop_negative_and_multiple_updates (tests direct-edge precedence vs negative-cycle propagation and unreachable routes)"}]}
